name: pr_ag7_lower_group_waits
drl:
rule F salience 10 when P($v : v) then drools.setFocus("a"); drools.setFocus("b"); end
rule A agenda-group "a" when P($v : v) then end
rule B1 agenda-group "b" when P($v : v) then insert(new Q(1)); end
rule A2 agenda-group "a" when Q($v : v) then end
rule B2 agenda-group "b" salience -5 when Q($v : v) then end
